gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/284)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/284)

parts.text: مِسْمَعٍ أَبِي سَيَّارٍ أَنَّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) كَتَبَ إِلَيْهِ

text: كِتَابٍ انْظُرْ أَنْ لَا تُكَلِّمَنَّ بِكَلِمَةِ بَغْيٍ أَبَداً وَ إِنْ أَعْجَبَتْكَ نَفْسَكَ وَ عَشِيرَتَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz,

(It has been narrated) from Misma’a Abu Sayyar that Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> wrote to him in a letter: ‘Look (be careful) that you do not speak with a transgressing word, ever, and even if it astounds yourself and your clan’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from Misma’ abu Sayyar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) once wrote a letter to me in which he had said, ‘Keep in mind not to ever speak a tyrannical and transgressing word even though your own soul and tribe are more captivating to you.’”
